enrichment: none (app pages — function carries the page)
nav: bottom tab bar (app chrome; N1a–N13 are marketing navs, see design.md)
brief: MealPlan · family food planning app · whole-app redesign, mobile-first, Hum + constructed dark variant
notes: Dark variant is original work for this project — Hum ships light-only. Built by inverting the anchor roles. Diversification is INVERTED for this project: pages must share the system, not differ (redesign.md § Multi-page).
